title: dianthus × notabilis
intro: Dianthus × notabilis, also known as the Sweet William or Notable Pink, is a hybrid perennial plant of the carnation family. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support respiratory health. Dianthus × notabilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in potpourri and other floral arrangements due to its fragrant flowers.
